title: call_batch key is call_id not method name — easy to mis-use
description: call_batch returns HashMap<String, Value> keyed by call_id (caller-chosen string like 'r1'). A caller returning to this 12 months later will likely expect the key to be the JMAP method name (e.g. 'Chat/get'). The doc states 'indexed by call id' but this is easy to skim past. The method name is also present in the Value but not surfaced in the map structure. A mis-use produces silent wrong-key lookups that return None with no error.
